metadata.instruction_given_to_llms: Write a short story (~500 words) based on the following prompt:

prompts.prompt: Our first interstellar ship exits the solar system, only to be confronted by a border-guard.
In an alternate world, a well-functioning society of zombies face an outbreak of humans.
Journal Entry Number 50: My refrigerator gave me a soul food recipe and then tried to eat my soul. Must remember to avoid kitchen.
You're being sent to the electric chair for a crime you didn't commit. As soon as the executioner flips the switch, the power goes out.
Look at these kids; they grew up in a world without hope. Without sun. Everything here must be amazing in their eyes.
A conman creates a suicide cult to get rich. It spirals out of his control.
A small act of kindness in a dystopia.
Create a character that I would hate over everything in this world.
On the 100th anniversary of his supposed death, Rasputin emerges from the ocean in San Francisco.
A group of prisoners play Dungeons and Dragons, but they are really using the game to openly talk in code and plan an escape.
Whilst working for a major animation studio, you discover their darkest secret. All animated characters are actually alive and have been kept in captivity to perform at the studio's will.
Humans are known as the most innovative species in the galaxy. When aliens invaded our planet, their technological advantage vanished very quickly.
You find yourself in the year 27 BC. All you have is a physical copy of Wikipedia.
You are on a field trip on the magic school bus and Mrs. Frizzle has made a terrible mistake.
Some entity discovers a fail-proof cure for death by natural causes. Earth can only sustain a finite number of living humans at any one time.
After proving your immortality by shooting yourself in the head in front of the FBI, you now find yourself in an FBI interview room.
The knight enters the abode of the dragon, only to find his child and a young dragon holding hands.
Are you alright? No, it's ringing.
You buy a mannequin and every day your roommates take turns posing it. However, one day, someone has actually broken in and you walk past them, assuming it is the mannequin.
A man killed his wife 2 weeks ago and starts hearing whispers in the middle of the night. He gets out of bed to find out where it's coming from.
